message:
fix(tui): replace emoji icons with unicode symbols for terminal compatibility

Replace emoji characters with universally supported unicode symbols in the TUI:

Circuit state icons:
- ⚡ → ↻ (HalfOpen)
- 🔴 → ● (Open)

Build status icons:
- ⏳ → ◷ (Pending)
- 📤 → ↑ (Syncing)
- 🔨 → ⚙ (Compiling)
- 📥 → ↓ (Downloading)
- ✅ → ✓ (Completed)
- ❌ → ✗ (Failed)

This ensures the TUI renders correctly in terminals without emoji support.

Fixes: bd-3hqn, bd-lcoa, bd-zs9f

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
